body: import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunner;
import org.junit.Test;
import me.lemire.integercompression.Simple16;
import me.lemire.integercompression.IntWrapper;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;
import static org.junit.Assert.*;

translation: assert "compressblock() missing 1 required positional argument: 'out'" in str(e)
assert "compressblock() missing 1 required positional argument: 'in_'" in str(e)
assert str(e) == "object of type 'NoneType' has no len()"
assert str(e) == "argument 1 is not iterable", "Expecting exception: RuntimeError"
assert str(e) == "object of type 'NoneType' has no len()", "no message in exception (getMessage() returned null)"
